calendar.title: i9 blocked Sam Lasko, Dokumentation ihrer Arbeit
Introduction to both seminars, Dr. Isabelle Graw, I9
DigiPraxSND - sound project start, i9
calendar.description:
We are happy to announce the launching of Digitale Praxis Sound / DigiPraxSND- a state funded initiative mainly focused on accelerating the digitization of sound production and increasing student participation and knowledge of all forms of digital sound practices. DigiPraxSND is funded by a three-year state grant and was initiated in response to great interest shown by both the student body and the wider community in sound practices in general. 

 

What this practically means is that there are basically more opportunities for students to experience and work within the large and expanding field of digital sound.

 

The budget of 20.000 EUR for 2022 has been allocated for the following:

·        Seminars with visiting professional musicians

·        Production Workshops

·        Recording Sessions

·        Purchasing new hardware and software

·        Expanding the community of practitioners and listeners  

 

The framework and structure of this initiative, its focus and schedule of activities were developed over the past year by a steering committee composed of faculty, staff and students. The committee's work is what guarantees the funding for this project. 

 

The members of the committee are:  

·        Jack Brennan (Student)

·        Second Student Position (provisionally filled, TBA)

·        Daniel Fort (Teaching / Sound Studio)

·        Prof. Hassan Khan (Professor / Fine Arts)

·        Prof. Philippe Pirotte (Professor / Art History and Curatorial Studies)

·        Bernhard Schreiner (Teaching / Film and Video)

·        Thomas Wizent (IT Specialist)

 

Project coordination will be provided by:  

Christian Frisch (Transformation Office)

 



Curious to find out more and how you may be involved in this initiative or activities? 

Please join our meeting on

 

April, 27th, 17:30h

in Dürerstraße (I9)

If you can't make it: The meeting will be hybrid.
https://staedelschule.zoom.us/j/98007029140?pwd=U1NQTWg2aXluUVBYODRxT3dZNHozQT09&from=addon

<https://staedelschule.zoom.us/j/98007029140?pwd=U1NQTWg2aXluUVBYODRxT3dZNHozQT09&from=addon>Meeting-ID:    980 0702 9140
Code:               110460

See you soon!  

Your DigiPraxSND coordination team

calendar.description:
Participation is limited to max. 15 architecture and fine art students. Please register via email at the Student
Office (studierendensekretariat@staedelschule.de) starting on 13 April 2021, 12pm (noon).
With your registration you sign up for both classes with Niklas Maak on Mondays and
Tuesdays: The Prototype Studio and the Digital City Studio.
